import { Tab, Tabs } from 'rspress/theme';

# h1

## h2 Tab

some content

<Tabs>

<Tab>

```js
const tab1 = tab;
```

</Tab>
<Tab>

```js
const tab2 = tab;
```

</Tab>
<Tab>

```js
const tab3 = tab;
```

</Tab>

</Tabs>

## h2 div

<div>
  outer
  <div>inner</div>
</div>

## h2 nested Tab

<Tabs>

<Tab>

<Tabs>

<Tab>

```js
const tab1 = tab;
```

</Tab>
<Tab>

```js
const tab2 = tab;
```

</Tab>

</Tabs>

</Tab>

<Tab>

second Tab

</Tab>

</Tabs>
